overview: Indian Institute of Technology Kharagpur (IIT Kharagpur), established in 1951, is the oldest IIT and a top-tier institute known for academic excellence, industry collaboration, and a vast campus. It offers multidisciplinary education in engineering, science, law, and management.
accreditation: Institute of National Importance; NAAC 'A++' accredited.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹1,00,000 per semester for General/OBC (income > ₹5 lakh). Income-based and caste-based waivers apply.
₹5,000 – ₹10,000 per semester for General/OBC (non-sponsored). Sponsored: ₹25,000 – ₹50,000. SC/ST/PwD are exempt.

placements.companiesVisited: Apple, Google, Microsoft, Quantbox, Databricks, DE Shaw, Capital One, Qualcomm, Texas Instruments
placements.internationalOffers: ₹2+ Cr international packages reported in Phase 1, 2025–26

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are based on national-level exams followed by JoSAA, COAP, or institute-level counseling for seat allocation.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions follow JoSAA/COAP schedule and IIT Kharagpur's academic calendar.

campus.specialNote: Hostel and mess charges are included in the ~₹48,000 per semester non-tuition fee component. One-time admission fee is ~₹6,700. Waivers are available based on income and category.

contact.address: IIT Kharagpur, Kharagpur – 721302, West Bengal, India
